title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入玻利维亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入玻利維亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Bolivia IBNORCA conformity requirements, AE (Autoridad de Fiscalización de Electricidad) licensing gates, ENDE and distributor grid-connection requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards, local fire and building authority requirements, UN 38.3 transport requirements, 50 Hz grid context, and high-altitude (Altiplano >3,600 m) derating considerations — versus China GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与玻利维亚IBNORCA合格评定要求、AE（电力监管局）许可门槛、ENDE及配电商并网要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、当地消防和建筑主管机关要求、UN 38.3运输要求、50 Hz电网背景及高海拔（阿尔蒂普拉诺高原>3,600 m）降容注意事项——对比中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與玻利維亞IBNORCA合格評定要求、AE（電力監管局）許可門檻、ENDE及配電商併網要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、當地消防和建築主管機關要求、UN 38.3運輸要求、50 Hz電網背景及高海拔（阿爾蒂普拉諾高原>3,600 m）降容注意事項——對比中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, IBNORCA conformity scope determination, AE licensing approval, ENDE or distributor grid-connection approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Bolivia IBNORCA technical regulations, AE licensing requirements, ENDE and distributor grid-connection technical specifications, local fire and building authority requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、IBNORCA合格评定范围裁定、AE许可批准、ENDE或配电商并网批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行玻利维亚IBNORCA技术法规、AE许可要求、ENDE及配电商并网技术规格、当地消防和建筑主管机关要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、IBNORCA合格評定範圍裁定、AE許可批准、ENDE或配電商併網批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行玻利維亞IBNORCA技術法規、AE許可要求、ENDE及配電商併網技術規格、當地消防和建築主管機關要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Bolivia does not have a comprehensive standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation. BESS market entry in Bolivia is governed by three regulatory gates: (1) IBNORCA conformity — Bolivia's national standards body adopts IEC standards; conformity assessment against IEC 62619 (cell/module safety) and IEC 62933 (system-level requirements) is the expected technical baseline for project acceptance; (2) AE (Autoridad de Fiscalización de Electricidad) licensing — the electricity sector regulator issues operating licences and approves grid-connected energy projects; BESS installations require AE authorisation; (3) ENDE and distributor grid connection — Empresa Nacional de Electricidad (ENDE) and its distribution subsidiaries are the state utility system; grid-connection agreements and technical requirements must be obtained directly. Additional Bolivia-specific considerations that affect BESS design and documentation: Bolivia's grid operates at 50 Hz (same as China) but at 230/400 V (versus China's 220/380 V) — frequency aligns but voltage class and protection settings still need confirmation; Bolivia includes the Altiplano plateau at >3,600 m above sea level, which causes real thermal derating and cooling design impacts on BESS equipment that must be addressed in product specifications; Bolivia is landlocked, and BESS equipment shipments from China route via Chilean ports (Arica, Iquique) or Peruvian port (Ilo), adding multi-country transport coordination and transit documentation requirements. Chinese GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC-based evidence in IBNORCA conformity assessment or AE/ENDE project review.
answer_first.zh: 玻利维亚尚无全面的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规。BESS进入玻利维亚市场须通过三个监管门槛：（1）IBNORCA合格评定——玻利维亚国家标准机构采用IEC标准；符合IEC 62619（电芯/模组安全）和IEC 62933（系统级要求）的合格评定是项目验收的预期技术基准；（2）AE（电力监管局）许可——电力行业监管机构颁发运营许可证并审批并网能源项目；BESS安装须取得AE授权；（3）ENDE及配电商并网——国家电力公司（ENDE）及其配电子公司是国家电力系统；并网协议和技术要求须直接向其获取。影响BESS设计和文件编制的玻利维亚特有注意事项：玻利维亚电网运行频率为50 Hz（与中国相同），但电压为230/400 V（中国为220/380 V）——频率一致，但电压等级和保护设定仍需确认；玻利维亚包含海拔>3,600 m的阿尔蒂普拉诺高原，对BESS设备造成实际热降容和散热设计影响，须在产品规格中加以应对；玻利维亚为内陆国，来自中国的BESS设备经由智利港口（阿里卡、伊基克）或秘鲁港口（伊洛）转运，增加了多国运输协调和过境文件要求。中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是生产基准，但在IBNORCA合格评定或AE/ENDE项目审查中不被接受为IEC依据的替代标准。
answer_first.zht: 玻利維亞尚無全面的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規。BESS進入玻利維亞市場須通過三個監管門檻：（1）IBNORCA合格評定——玻利維亞國家標準機構採用IEC標準；符合IEC 62619（電芯/模組安全）和IEC 62933（系統級要求）的合格評定是項目驗收的預期技術基準；（2）AE（電力監管局）許可——電力行業監管機構頒發運營許可證並審批併網能源項目；BESS安裝須取得AE授權；（3）ENDE及配電商併網——國家電力公司（ENDE）及其配電子公司是國家電力系統；併網協議和技術要求須直接向其獲取。影響BESS設計和文件編制的玻利維亞特有注意事項：玻利維亞電網運行頻率為50 Hz（與中國相同），但電壓為230/400 V（中國為220/380 V）——頻率一致，但電壓等級和保護設定仍需確認；玻利維亞包含海拔>3,600 m的阿爾蒂普拉諾高原，對BESS設備造成實際熱降容和散熱設計影響，須在產品規格中加以應對；玻利維亞為內陸國，來自中國的BESS設備經由智利港口（阿里卡、伊基克）或秘魯港口（伊洛）轉運，增加了多國運輸協調和過境文件要求。中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是製造基準，但在IBNORCA合格評定或AE/ENDE項目審查中不被接受為IEC依據的替代標準。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
